name: Corsair Premium Individually Sleeved PSU Cable Kit

specs.Compatibility: Corsair Type 4 PSUs (RMx, RMi, SF series)
specs.CablesIncluded: 1x 24-pin ATX, 2x EPS12V CPU, 2x PCIe Dual, 2x PCIe Single

description: Individually sleeved paracord cables in a complete kit. Includes pre-installed modular cable combs to keep routing neat.
highlights: Wide compatibility with Corsair modular power supplies
